content: I saw Arjun Roy walking near his shop at around 9 PM on August 13. He was carrying a plastic bag—probably groceries. He waved at me. I thought he was fine. He didn’t look drunk or unwell. I remember because I was watering my plants. I didn’t see him leave after that. I didn’t see him return. I didn’t know he was dead until the next morning. I don’t know anything about insurance or his health. I only saw him walking. That’s all.
